entries.title: The solution might be cancelling my AI subscription
entries.summary: The solution might be cancelling my AI subscription I find this post by David Wilson very relatable. David lists 16+ projects he's spun up with AI tooling, and concludes: I didn't mean to build most of these things. entries.title: Quoting Karen Kwok for Reuters Breakingviews
entries.summary: Anthropic defines “run-rate revenue” in two parts. Use the last 28 days of sales ⁠from customers charged on a consumption basis and multiply it by 13. Then, multiply the monthly subscription take by 12, ​and add the two together. — Karen Kwok for Reuters Breakingviews , citing "a person familiar with the matter" Tags: anthropic , ai
